title: CTR Rescue Day 3 (Phase 13C.4)
note: Day 3 CTR rescue. 10 pages improved across guides, comparison pages, and indexed tool variants. 5 pages skipped (3 geo pages noindexed, 2 scenarios noindexed). All improvements focus on title-meta intent matching and SERP snippet optimization.

reviewed_pages.changes: Title already strong: 'Best Mortgage Calculator 2026 — Free, Fast & Accurate | QFINHUB'. Meta description optimized for click-through: added 'Side-by-side comparison vs Bankrate, NerdWallet, Zillow.' Added 'vs' comparison angle to meta for query intent match.
Title: 'Best Compound Interest Calculator 2026 — Free & Fast'. Meta now includes 'Compare top compound interest calculators side-by-side.'
Title: 'Best Retirement Calculator 2026 — Plan Your Future Free.' Meta emphasizes 'Compare retirement planning tools — no signup required.'
Title: 'Best Loan Calculator 2026 — Calculate Any Payment Free.' Meta adds 'Compare loan calculators with amortization schedules.'
Title now includes the answer: 'How Much House Can I Afford on $130K? At 7% Interest — Free Calculator.' Former generic title replaced with question+answer format.

Title front-loaded: 'Fed 2025 Report: How the Economy Affects Your Mortgage & Savings.' Meta now summarizes key finding: 'The Federal Reserve's 2025 household economic well-being report reveals critical insights for mortgage borrowers and savers.'
Title shortened for SERP: 'Mortgage Rates Hit 5-Week High: Why Homebuyers Aren't Worried (2025).' Meta: 'Despite rates climbing to a 5-week high, homebuyer demand remains resilient.'
Title: 'How to Use a Mortgage Affordability Calculator: Step-by-Step Guide (2026).' Added benefit hook in meta: 'Learn exactly what you can afford before you start house hunting.'
Title: 'How to Use a Compound Interest Calculator: Grow Your Wealth (2026).' Meta: 'See how small investments compound into millions over time.'
Title: 'How to Use a Debt Payoff Calculator: Get Out of Debt Faster (2026).' Meta: 'Choose between snowball and avalanche methods — see which saves you more.'
